summary: Iteration 33: Onboarding Wizard Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested onboarding wizards for Guardian Portal (5 steps), Brand Portal (5 steps), and Student Academy (4 steps). All wizards appear on first visit, navigation works correctly, Skip/Get Started buttons dismiss wizards, localStorage keys persist properly, and wizards don't reappear on subsequent visits.
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingWizard component is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
localStorage key format: sv_onboarding_{portalType}_{userId} works correctly
All three portal integrations (Guardian, Brand, Student) pass wizard correctly via props
Step content definitions in onboardingSteps.js are complete for all portal types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard feature fully tested and working. Wizards use localStorage to track if user has seen the wizard. Key format is sv_onboarding_{portalType}_{userId}. Guardian Portal has 5 steps, Brand Portal has 5 steps, Student Academy has 4 steps. All data-testid attributes are present and working.

Wizard does NOT appear on subsequent visits - PASSED
